query:
SELECT 'moodLogs' AS tbl, COUNT(*) AS rows FROM moodLogs
UNION ALL SELECT 'moodSignals', COUNT(*) FROM moodSignals
UNION ALL SELECT 'timelineEvents', COUNT(*) FROM timelineEvents
UNION ALL SELECT 'icalEvents', COUNT(*) FROM icalEvents
UNION ALL SELECT 'assignmentSubmissions', COUNT(*) FROM assignmentSubmissions
UNION ALL SELECT 'blockGrades', COUNT(*) FROM blockGrades
UNION ALL SELECT 'parentFlags', COUNT(*) FROM parentFlags
UNION ALL SELECT 'emotionalStruggles', COUNT(*) FROM emotionalStruggles
UNION ALL SELECT 'listeningSummaries', COUNT(*) FROM listeningSummaries
UNION ALL SELECT 'books', COUNT(*) FROM books
UNION ALL SELECT 'ownedBooks', COUNT(*) FROM ownedBooks
UNION ALL SELECT 'bookAssignments', COUNT(*) FROM bookAssignments;
